name: Peach Walnut Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugars until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in eggs, then add molasses; beat thoroughly.
3. Peel and chop peaches; stir into the mixture.
4. Combine remaining ingredients and stir into the creamed mixture until smooth.
5. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9-inch square pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 40 to 50 minutes, or until a pick inserted into the center comes out dry.
7. Cut into squares and top with whipped cream and peach slices if desired.
Makes 1 cake
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 9-inch square pan.
